description: One row per month. Values = cumulative last-of-month minus last-of-previous-month.

targets.query:
import "math"
import "timezone"
import "array"

jst = timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo")

monthly =
  from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value")
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r.name == "pv_cumulative" or r.name == "pv3_cumulative")
    |> group(columns: ["name"])
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, location: jst, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value", "name"])

anchors =
  array.from(rows: [
    {_time: time(v: "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"), _value: 0.0, name: "pv_cumulative"},
    {_time: time(v: "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"), _value: 0.0, name: "pv3_cumulative"},
  ])
    |> group(columns: ["name"])

union(tables: [monthly, anchors])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference()
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["_time"], columnKey: ["name"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: time(v: int(v: r._time) - 1),
      "PV (kWh)": math.round(x: (
        (if exists r.pv_cumulative  then r.pv_cumulative  else 0.0) +
        (if exists r.pv3_cumulative then r.pv3_cumulative else 0.0)
      ) * 10.0) / 10.0
  }))
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

import "math"
import "timezone"
import "array"

jst = timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo")

monthly =
  from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "load_cumulative")
    |> group()
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, location: jst, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

anchor =
  array.from(rows: [{_time: time(v: "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"), _value: 0.0}])

union(tables: [monthly, anchor])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: time(v: int(v: r._time) - 1),
      "Load (kWh)": math.round(x: (if r._value >= 0.0 then r._value else 0.0) * 10.0) / 10.0
  }))
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)

import "math"
import "timezone"
import "array"

jst = timezone.location(name: "Asia/Tokyo")

monthly =
  from(bucket: v.defaultBucket)
    |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
    |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "modbus" and r._field == "value" and r.name == "batt_charge_cumulative")
    |> group()
    |> aggregateWindow(every: 1mo, location: jst, fn: last, createEmpty: false)
    |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])

anchor =
  array.from(rows: [{_time: time(v: "1970-01-01T00:00:00Z"), _value: 0.0}])

union(tables: [monthly, anchor])
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"])
  |> difference()
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: time(v: int(v: r._time) - 1),
      "Batt Charge (kWh)": math.round(x: (if r._value >= 0.0 then r._value else 0.0) * 10.0) / 10.0
  }))
  |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true)
